goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'portuguese' food and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 09:45' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'train ID', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
